summary: Comprehensive OLAP Assistant testing completed. Backend APIs fully functional (7/7 tests passed), frontend UI mostly functional with critical chat response display issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Chat queries are sent successfully but LLM responses are not being displayed in the UI
ui_bugs.details: Backend chat API works correctly (verified via direct API testing), but frontend is not rendering the assistant responses. This affects the core functionality of the OLAP Assistant.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts pointer events preventing some interactions
ui_bugs.details: Dialog overlays are blocking clicks on dropdown options, affecting filter building user experience.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend-backend integration issue with chat response rendering
integration_issues.details: Queries reach backend and get processed by Claude Sonnet 4.5, but responses are not displayed in the chat interface.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/data/summary returns data summary with $28.8M total sales
Backend: POST /api/chat processes natural language queries
Backend: POST /api/olap/query executes direct OLAP queries
Backend: GET /api/olap/sales-by-region returns regional sales data
Backend: GET /api/olap/sales-by-product returns product sales data
Frontend: Dashboard loads with 4 metric cards properly aligned
Frontend: Query Assistant panel displays with 5 example queries
Frontend: Clicking example queries fills input field
Frontend: Filter Builder dialog opens and allows adding filters
Frontend: OLAP Guide dialog shows all 5 operations (Drill-Down, Roll-Up, Slice, Dice, Pivot)
Frontend: Data Cube dialog shows 3D cube visualization
Frontend: Query History dialog opens and tracks queries
Frontend: Compare dialog allows selecting dimensions and items
Frontend: Dark/Light mode toggle works correctly
Frontend: Available Dimensions section shows regions, products, quarters, years
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix chat response display issue. Backend chat API works correctly but frontend is not rendering LLM responses. Check chat message state management, WebSocket connections, or async response handling in the React components. Also fix modal overlay interception in Filter Builder dialog.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (most UI features work, critical chat display issue)
